name: baby cot
description: The client is a young single mother who will be delivering anytime. She has no income at the moment due to pregnancy, and there is also minimal help from the family that is also struggling financially. She is appreciative if she can have a baby cot for her baby.

passiton.name: Baby cot
passiton.description: Baby cot in good condition with slight used marks.

(We are working parents or if you tends not to reply then we would appreciate if you kindly skip our post. Only contact through email or WhatsApp - NO PHONE CALL. Thank you.)

name: Fan
description: Single mother with a school-going son recently transitioned from Transitional Shelter to a HDB rental flat in Sembawang following divorce proceedings. Client is currently unemployed and actively seeking employment. Family requires essential household items (e.g. refrigerator, washing machine, fan, furniture) as the flat is currently unfurnished and they are unable to move in fully.

contact.org: Care Corner Family Service Centre - Toa Payoh
contact.name: Vienne Chiam

passiton.name: Desk fan
passiton.description:
Fan can still work but cannot swivel. 
Self collect at my HDB block.

name: Refrigerator
description:
The family comprises seven household members residing in a 2-room flat. The husband is the sole breadwinner, while the client is medically unfit for employment due to multiple chronic illnesses. The client’s daughters are also unable to take up employment as they have chronic health conditions of their own and are the primary caregivers to the client, their elderly grandmother, and a nephew who is currently in primary school. As a result, the household has limited financial resources and is unable to afford the replacement of essential household appliances.

The family’s existing fridge is no longer functioning effectively, as it is unable to maintain sufficient cooling, resulting in food spoiling after a short period of storage. As the household relies heavily on daily home-cooked meals, the ability to store fresh ingredients safely is essential. In addition, several family members have diabetes and require proper refrigeration for insulin storage, which is currently compromised due to the faulty fridge. The provision of a donated fridge would support safe food storage, ensure appropriate medication storage and enable consistent meal preparation, thereby contributing to better health management and overall household wellbeing.

passiton.name: Samsung Refrigerator 255L
passiton.description:
Fridge to give away 
SAMSUNG 255L 2 DOOR FRIDGE ALL-AROUND RT25FARADSA/SS (TOP MOUNT FREEZER) (SILVER)
SKU, looks a bit worn down but functions well, lightly used. 
Fridge locks installed can be removed

name: Single Bed with Frame
description: Family of 3 looking for a single bed for the 9 year old boy, family recently saved up enough to move out of public rental and hopes that somebody can help to support them by providing a bed for their child, they are currently sleeping together in the same bed. Please provide delivery to family as well, located at Bukit Batok

name: Single-size Mattress
description: Client lives in a rental flat and has 3 young children who are currently using bedding that is worn and no longer in suitable condition. This may be affecting their overall health, quality of rest, and school attendance. We are therefore reaching out to seek support from anyone who may be able to provide the family with 3 single mattresses. These items would help improve the children’s sleeping conditions, contributing positively to their overall well-being and daily functioning.

contact.org: Care Corner Family Service Centre - Admiralty
contact.name: Shanell Tan

passiton.name: Single Sized Mattress
passiton.location: Ardmore, Balmoral, Bukit Timah, Grange Road, Holland Road, Orchard Boulevard, Tanglin
